name: Is it my fault if I was rushing and got hit by a cart in the warehouse?
description: No-fault for comp; doesn't affect benefits.[1]

mainEntity.name: Is it my fault if I was rushing and got hit by a cart in the warehouse?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault for comp; doesn't affect benefits.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp is no-fault, so your contributory negligence doesn't reduce benefits.** Solely employer negligence matters for third-party claims.[1][4] Key factors: safety violations by others strengthen case; avoid admitting fault early. Focus on hazard reporting; comp covers regardless. Fault rarely bars comp.[3]
